mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`user_pin` (user_id, pin_hash, fail_count, locked_until, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pinHash}, 0, NULL, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pin_hash = #{pinHash}, fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`user_pin` SET pin_hash = #{encodedPin}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT `user_id` AS `userId`, `pin_hash` AS `pinHash`, `fail_count` AS `failCount`, `locked_until` AS `lockedUntil`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `bank`.`user_pin` WHERE user_id = #{userId}
